description: Gavin Wood, co-founder of Ethereum, introduced the term Web3 in 2014 to define a decentralized Internet utilizing blockchain technology. Web3 aims to empower users and counteract the dominance of major tech platforms seen in Web2.
topic_summary: Web3 represents the evolution of the Internet from read-only (Web1) and read-write (Web2) to a read-write-own model, focusing on decentralization and user control [t=0:48].
